heading: Use of investigational new drugs with respect to acquired immune deficiency syndrome
label: 300cc–12 Use of investigational new drugs with respect to acquired immune deficiency syndrome
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 300cc–12, act , § 2313, was successively renumbered by subsequent acts and transferred, see .July 1, 1944section 238j of this title
Amendments1993—Subsec. (a)(2)(A). substituted “AIDS Research Advisory Committee” for “AIDS Clinical Research Review Committee”.Pub. L. 103–43
amendments: Amendments1993—Subsec. (a)(2)(A). substituted “AIDS Research Advisory Committee” for “AIDS Clinical Research Review Committee”.Pub. L. 103–43

children.heading: Encouragement of applications with respect to clinical trials
children.label: a Encouragement of applications with respect to clinical trials
A
children.text: announce the fact of such determination; and

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to the new drug involved, encourage an application for an exemption for investigational use of the new drug under regulations issued under .section 355(i) of title 21

children.label: A
children.text: The AIDS Research Advisory Committee established pursuant to shall make recommendations to the Secretary with respect to new drugs appropriate for determinations described in paragraph (1).section 300cc–3 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: The Secretary shall, as soon as is practicable, determine the merits of recommendations received by the Secretary pursuant to subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Encouragement of applications with respect to treatment use in circumstances other than clinical trials
children.label: b Encouragement of applications with respect to treatment use in circumstances other than clinical trials
i
children.text: who are infected with the etiologic agent for acquired immune deficiency syndrome; and

children.label: ii
children.text: who are not participating in the clinical trials conducted pursuant to such exemption; and

children.label: B
children.text: if such an application is approved, encourage, as appropriate, licensed medical practitioners to obtain, in accordance with such regulations, the new drug from such sponsor for the purpose of treating such individuals.

If the sponsor of the investigation of a new drug described in paragraph (1) does not submit to the Secretary an application described in such paragraph (relating to treatment use), the Secretary shall, through statements published in the Federal Register, encourage, as appropriate, licensed medical practitioners to submit to the Secretary such applications in accordance with regulations described in such paragraph.

children.heading: Technical assistance with respect to treatment use
children.label: c Technical assistance with respect to treatment use

children.text: submitting to the Secretary applications for exemptions described in paragraph (1)(B) of such subsection;
submitting to the Secretary applications described in subsection (b); and
with respect to sponsors of investigations of new drugs, facilitating the transfer of new drugs from such sponsors to licensed medical practitioners.

children.heading: “New drug” defined
children.label: d “New drug” defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “new drug” has the meaning given such term in .section 321 of title 21
